overview: HERO BLOG is a decentralized editorial blog platform on the Internet Computer. Visitors browse free and premium articles about ICP, Web3, and ecosystem news. Premium content is unlocked with HERO tokens — pay 1 HERO for a single article or 10 HERO for a monthly subscription. Admins publish and manage content through a built-in dashboard.
features: Free and premium article browsing with cover images, titles, excerpts, and category labels
Internet Identity login for secure access
Pay 1 HERO for one-time article access or 10 HERO for a 30-day subscription
HERO token (ICRC-1) payment verification against the live HERO canister
Admin dashboard to create, edit, delete, and publish articles with rich text editor and cover image upload
Responsive dark editorial design with clear CTAs
